name: Crockpot Barbecue Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onion slices in the bottom of a large crockpot.
2. Dot the pork roast with cloves.
3. Place the roast in the crockpot along with the water.
4. Cover and cook for at least 8 hours (or overnight).
5. Remove the roast from the crockpot, taking out the cloves.
6. Shred the pork.
7. Discard the liquid and onions.
8. Add the shredded pork, barbecue sauce, and sugar to the crockpot.
9. Cover and cook for at least 2 more hours.
10. Serve on toasted buns with slices of fresh onion, if desired.
